summary:
_🤖 This is an automated review. Addressing it doesn't guarantee a merge._

Correct bug fix. Both native platforms (iOS and Android) emit `{"value": T}` for the `change` event, but `addSharedStateListener` was passing the raw event object to the callback instead of unwrapping `.value`. The `useSharedState` hook in the same file already handles this correctly. The fix aligns the two code paths.

One minor CHANGELOG style note below.

comments.body:
The CHANGELOG entries in this repo use plain descriptions (e.g., `Fix shared state listener not unwrapping native event value`), not conventional-commit format. Consider reformatting to match the surrounding style:

```
- Fix `addSharedStateListener` passing the raw native event object instead of the unwrapped value ([#44401](...) by [@mberube09](...))
```
comments.line_content: fix(expo-brownfield): unwrap native event in addSharedStateListener
